title: Youtube Poop - Before Michael Buckly has an Asthma Attack...
description:
**UPDATED 6/10** READ DAMN YOU!

I renamed the video from "DieCarly needs ytps" to "Before Michael Buckly has an Asthma Attack..." for obvious reasons. This video is clearly a prequel to KroboProductions'. :P And before anyone says anything: I DID NOT COPY HIM CHECK THE DATES YOU BOOBS. Renaming this video is a gag at how the two of us somehow managed to poop the beginning and the end (respectively) of the same episode and posted it almost simutamously. As far as I know, Krobo knows nothing about this.

And if you missed the last update-- part two isn't coming precisely because of Krobo's video.
